svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 23px; margin-left: 500px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Phase 別の非機能要件目標の引き上げ方

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 46px; margin-left: 500px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Phase 1 はパイロット運用を成立させるラインを狙い、Phase 3 でスコープ拡大、Phase 5 で全社ロールアウト相当の品質に到達する。
